languages.text: {n}Дни сменяли часы, но ксеносы не проявляли активности. В конце концов, гробница железных скелетов утихла, и тошнотворные зеленые огни угасли. Но дозор никто не распустил. Служившие в нем стали призраками, охраняющими мертвых.{/n}

{n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Дни сменяли часы, но ксеносы не проявляли активности. В конце концов, гробница железных скелетов утихла, и тошнотворные зеленые огни угасли. Но дозор никто не распустил. Служившие в нем стали призраками, охраняющими мертвых.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

{n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

{n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

languages.text: {n}時が日に変わっても、異形は動かなかった。鉄の骨の墓は静まり、病み気のある緑色の光は消えた。しかし、誰も警戒を解かなかった。死者を守る幽霊となった兵士たち。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}時が日に変わっても、異形は動かなかった。鉄の骨の墓は静まり、病み気のある緑色の光は消えた。しかし、誰も警戒を解かなかった。死者を守る幽霊となった兵士たち。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las horas se convirtieron en días, pero los xenos siguieron inactivos. Con el tiempo, la tumba de esqueletos de hierro quedó en silencio y las enfermizas luces verdes se apagaron. Pero la guardia permaneció en activo. Los hombres que servían en ellas se convirtieron en fantasmas que vigilaban a los muertos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Las horas se convirtieron en días, pero los xenos siguieron inactivos. Con el tiempo, la tumba de esqueletos de hierro quedó en silencio y las enfermizas luces verdes se apagaron. Pero la guardia permaneció en activo. Los hombres que servían en ellas se convirtieron en fantasmas que vigilaban a los muertos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}数小时延为数日，异形毫无动静。最终，铁骸墓穴归于死寂，病态绿光也尽数熄灭。然而守望并未解除。驻守在那里的人，从此成了守卫死者的幽魂。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}数小时延为数日，异形毫无动静。最终，铁骸墓穴归于死寂，病态绿光也尽数熄灭。然而守望并未解除。驻守在那里的人，从此成了守卫死者的幽魂。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Aus Stunden wurden Tage, aber die Xenos regten sich nicht. Schließlich versank das Grab der Eisenskelette in Stille und die grünen Lichter erloschen. Dennoch verließ niemand die Wache. Die Männer, die in ihr gedient hatten, wurden Geister, die die Toten bewachten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus Stunden wurden Tage, aber die Xenos regten sich nicht. Schließlich versank das Grab der Eisenskelette in Stille und die grünen Lichter erloschen. Dennoch verließ niemand die Wache. Die Männer, die in ihr gedient hatten, wurden Geister, die die Toten bewachten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Saatler günlere döndü ama zenolar hiçbir faaliyet göstermedi. Sonunda demir iskeletlerin mezarı sessizliğe gömüldü, hastalıklı yeşil ışıklar söndü. Ancak kimse nöbeti dağıtmadı. Nöbet tutan adamlar, ölüleri bekleyen hayaletlere dönüştü.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Saatler günlere döndü ama zenolar hiçbir faaliyet göstermedi. Sonunda demir iskeletlerin mezarı sessizliğe gömüldü, hastalıklı yeşil ışıklar söndü. Ancak kimse nöbeti dağıtmadı. Nöbet tutan adamlar, ölüleri bekleyen hayaletlere dönüştü.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les heures devinrent des jours, mais les xénos ne montrèrent aucun signe d'activité, jusqu'au jour où le tombeau des squelettes de fer se tut, et où les lueurs d'un vert malsain s'éteignirent. Pourtant, la garde ne fut jamais dissoute. Les sentinelles, devenues des fantômes, continuèrent à garder les morts.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Hours became days, but the xenos showed no activity. Eventually, the tomb of iron skeletons fell silent, and the sickly green lights went out. But no one disbanded the watch. The men who served in it became ghosts guarding the dead.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les heures devinrent des jours, mais les xénos ne montrèrent aucun signe d'activité, jusqu'au jour où le tombeau des squelettes de fer se tut, et où les lueurs d'un vert malsain s'éteignirent. Pourtant, la garde ne fut jamais dissoute. Les sentinelles, devenues des fantômes, continuèrent à garder les morts.{/n}
